nyc.label: New York City
nyc.today_detail: Rain showers and patchy fog before 5pm. Mostly cloudy. High near 57, with temperatures falling to around 50 in the afternoon. West wind 6 to 18 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

miami.today_detail: A slight chance of rain showers after 3pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 90. West wind around 3 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.
